display_text: Pudge Aghanim's Scepter: Increases Rot radius and damage, and reduces enemy Health Restoration. This upgrade counters high-health regeneration and healing mechanics, making Pudge a strong counter to heroes reliant on sustain tactics. It enhances his area denial capabilities in team fights.
search_text: Pudge Aghanim Scepter anti-healing health restoration sustain counter area denial

display_text: Pudge Aghanim's Shard: Meat Hook deals bonus damage based on distance when hitting enemies and reduces cooldown by 50% when hitting allies. This upgrade counters long-range disengages and synergizes with ally repositioning, enhancing Pudge’s role as both a damage dealer and a support for saving allies.
search_text: Pudge Aghanim Shard long-range damage repositioning disengage support ally save
